The [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] '''3t3 missile''' was a small guided [[Missile/Legends|missile]] armed with a miniature [[Proton warhead/Legends|proton warhead]] and used in portable launchers, such as [[Merr-Sonn Industrial Equipment|Merr-Sonn's]] [[PLX-2M portable missile launcher]]. A PLX-2M's missiles cartridge was typically loaded with six of these missiles.<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> Often used against airborne threats, the launchers themselves and the weapons they fired were nicknamed "chip missiles" by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] starfighter pilots.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''
